hausa.sr_imported: An shigo da organizer — yanzu ka mai da shi naka
hausa.sr_reset: An sake saita tsari zuwa asalin siffa
hausa.sculpt_engine_failed: Ba a iya loda sculpting engine ba.
hausa.sculpt_failed: Sculpting ya kasa — gwada bayani mai sauƙi.
hausa.assess_failed: Coach bai iya amsawa ba — sake gwadawa.
hausa.sr_assessed: Ra'ayin coach yana shirye ƙarƙashin builder panel
hausa.recall_needs_more: Da farko ƙara aƙalla ideas 4 cikin rukuni 2
hausa.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: dukan ideas sun faɗi cikin tray. Mayar da kowanne wurin sa.
hausa.sr_recall_complete: Ka sake gina duniyarka gaba ɗaya daga ƙwaƙwalwa!
hausa.snapshot_failed: Ba a iya ɗaukar 3D view a nan ba.
hausa.print_saved: An sauke one-pager — buɗe shi ka buga
hausa.print_failed: Ba a iya ƙirƙirar one-pager ba.
hausa.import_replaces: Wannan zai maye gurbin composition ɗinka na yanzu.
hausa.title: Forms Masu 'Yanci
hausa.tagline: Gina Duniyar Forms ɗinka: zaɓi archetypal structure, cika shi da ideas naka, tsara a 3D, sannan ka sassaƙa abin da ke da muhimmanci.
hausa.tagline2: A nan kai ne marubuci — AI kawai yana ba da jagora, kuma sai in ka nema.
hausa.keep_content_hint: Rukunoninka da ideas suna nan — zaɓar form kawai yana canza siffar sarari.
hausa.print_tip: Sauke one-pager mai bugawa (snapshot + ideas naka + ra'ayin coach)
hausa.recall_tip: Ideas naka suna faɗuwa cikin tray — mayar da su daga ƙwaƙwalwa
hausa.assess_tip: Ka nemi AI coach ya duba composition ɗinka gaba ɗaya
hausa.recall_instructions: Dukan ideas sun faɗi daga wurarensu zuwa tray ƙasa. Zaɓi idea a sarari, sannan yi amfani da group chips (ko maɓallan [ da ]) don tura shi gida. Ba a ajiye komai lokacin wasa.
hausa.recall_complete: ka sake gina duniyarka gaba ɗaya!
hausa.recall_hint: Alama don idea da aka zaɓa
hausa.title_placeholder: Wannan duniya game da me ce?
hausa.note_placeholder: Me ya sa wannan idea ke nan?
hausa.studio_move: Matsar da part da aka zaɓa
hausa.no_3d: Ba a iya loda 3D space a nan ba — builder panel ɗinka har yanzu yana aiki, kuma duk abin da ka rubuta ana ajiyewa.
hausa.stage_hint: A sarari: ja idea don sanya shi · ja background don juyawa · scroll don zuma · [ da ] suna matsar da idea da aka zaɓa tsakanin rukuni.
hausa.questions: Tambayoyin da za a yi tunani
